creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On Sun, 18 Aug 2013 17:01:55 +0900
Eijiro Shibusawa <phd_kimberlite@yahoo.co.jp> wrote:

> Hi, Mr. Hartmann,
> 
> Recently I had submitted an openblas update which includes a bug fix
> for this PR, and it was committed to the latest tree (ports/181268).
> If the update solves your build error, please ask a committer to close
> this PR.
> 
> Best regards,


The patch provided works for me (and hopefully others) and let the port
math/openblas build again cleanly.

From my side, the PR can be closed as solved if no other objections
arise.

Best regards,

O. Hartmann
